com.mentor.chs.plugin.wiringdesigngenerator

Interface IXDiagramPartitioner


  • public interface IXDiagramPartitioner
    This class is used by CAVAI during diagram generation to determine the diagarm partitions for each functional diagram.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getDiagramNameForUndistributedObjects()
      This method returns the name to be used for a diagram which is created to hold the schematics of all the objects which could not be distributed to any partition diagram.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXDiagramPartition> getPartitions(IXLogicDiagram functionalDiagram)
      This method returns a set of diagram partitions that have to be created for the specified functional diagram.

    • Method Detail

      • getPartitions

        java.util.Set<? extends IXDiagramPartition> getPartitions(IXLogicDiagram functionalDiagram)
        This method returns a set of diagram partitions that have to be created for the specified functional diagram. The returned collection can be empty or null if no partitioning is required for the specified functional diagram. In this case the system will create a single wiring diagram for the specified functional diagram
        Parameters:
        functionalDiagram - A functional diagram
        Returns:
        A collection of partition objects. If no partitioning is required, implementation can return empty or null.

      • getDiagramNameForUndistributedObjects

        java.lang.String getDiagramNameForUndistributedObjects()
        This method returns the name to be used for a diagram which is created to hold the schematics of all the objects which could not be distributed to any partition diagram. If all the objects are distributed to partition diagrams then the system will not create this additional diagram. In case of multi-design diagram generation, the diagram for undistributed objects will be created in a design of its own. The returned name is used for both the diagram and the design.
        Returns:
        Name of the diagram on which any undistributed objects will be shown
